## reference · Design Tokens W3C DTCG Format
* Design tokens are platform-agnostic, shareable design decisions.
* Design tokens help establish a common vocabulary across organizations.
* Tools exist for design system maintainers and consumers to incorporate design token functionality.

* Design tokens have **primitive types**: 
  + Color
  + Dimension
  + Font family
  + Font weight
  + Duration
  + Cubic Bézier
  + Number

* Design tokens have **composite types**: 
  + Stroke style
  + Border
  + Transition
  + Shadow
  + Gradient
  + Typography

* Design token **file format requirements**:
  + Media type (MIME type)
  + File extensions

* Design token **properties**:
  + Name
  + Value
  + Description
  + Type
  + Extensions
  + Deprecated

* Design token **groups**:
  + Group structure
  + Root tokens in groups
  + Group properties ($deprecated, $extensions)
  + Extending groups

* **References and JSON Pointer Integration**:
  + Reference syntax (curly brace and JSON pointer)
  + Reference resolution

Sources: https://tr.designtokens.org/format/
